name: Image Columns
description: Row-based block where each cell is treated either as an image column or a text column. The implementation can also replace a text cell with a local MP4 video in some themed cases.
usageNotes: Generate the plain image-plus-text structure first.
The MP4 substitution path is repo-specific and depends on section classes or local file naming; it is not part of the safe first contract.
Documented sample names: Image to the left, Image to the right.
ambiguityNotes: Several visual variants are inferred from CSS only.
Theme-specific section classes such as columnvideo are intentionally omitted from the contract.
